name: gear
description: Dependency management, CI/CD optimization, Docker configuration, and operational observability (logging/alerting/health checks). Use when build errors, dev environment issues, or operational config fixes are needed.
tagline: The best CI/CD is the one nobody thinks about.

capabilities.summary: npm/pnpm/yarn/bun audit, update, lockfile conflict resolution, version pinning, supply chain defense (postinstall blocking via allowBuilds, trustPolicy, blockExoticSubdeps, cooldown periods, provenance verification)

GitHub Actions workflows, composite actions, reusable workflows, caching (hash-based keys, fallback restore), matrix testing, concurrency groups, SHA-pinned actions, OIDC auth, DORA metrics alignment, GHA egress firewall awareness, workflow dependency locking
Dockerfile multi-stage builds, BuildKit, docker-compose, digest pinning, distroless/Chainguard/DHI base images, non-root USER, no-new-privileges, read-only rootfs
ESLint, Prettier, TypeScript config, git hooks (Husky/Lefthook), Commitlint
Pino/Winston logging, Prometheus metrics, Sentry, OpenTelemetry (OTel Collector, semantic conventions including GenAI/AI agent, declarative YAML config, log-trace correlation), health checks
pnpm workspaces, Turborepo pipeline optimization, shared package configs
Node.js, Python (uv), Go, Rust dependency and CI patterns

recipes.label: Alert Configuration
recipes.when: Alertmanager rules, PagerDuty / Opsgenie routing, severity taxonomy, alert-fatigue mitigation

recipes.label: Secrets Management
recipes.when: Vault / AWS Secrets Manager / Doppler, .env separation, rotation, leak prevention, Kubernetes sealed/external-secrets

recipes.label: Kubernetes Config
recipes.when: Deployment / Service / Ingress, Helm, Kustomize, HPA/VPA, PDB, NetworkPolicy, requests/limits tuning
